scripts.dev: concurrently --names "FRONT,SERVER,STORYBOOK" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "pnpm run dev:front" "pnpm run dev:server" "pnpm run dev:storybook"
scripts.dev:https: concurrently --names "FRONT,SERVER,STORYBOOK" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "pnpm run dev:front:https" "pnpm run dev:server" "pnpm run dev:storybook"
scripts.dev:front: pnpm dotenvx run -- sh -c 'cd frontend && pnpm run dev'
scripts.dev:front:https: pnpm dotenvx run -- sh -c 'cd frontend && pnpm run dev:https'
scripts.dev:server: pnpm dotenvx run -- sh -c 'cd server && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload'
scripts.install:all: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && cd frontend && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
scripts.sync: pnpm run install:all && cd server && uv sync
scripts.build:stg: pnpm dotenvx run --env-file .env.stg -- sh -c 'cd frontend && pnpm run build'
scripts.build:prod: pnpm dotenvx run --env-file .env.prod -- sh -c 'cd frontend && pnpm run build'
